- Step 1: In the owner interface, click the Setting button.

![fst](https://sigen-data-cn-public.s3.cn-northwest-1.amazonaws.com.cn//sysId11.jpg)

- Step 2: Click the icon in the upper right corner, which looks like three dots.

![snd](https://sigen-data-cn-public.s3.cn-northwest-1.amazonaws.com.cn//sysId22.md.jpg)

- Step 3: The systemId information for the power station will be displayed in the Basic Info section.

![trd](https://sigen-data-cn-public.s3.cn-northwest-1.amazonaws.com.cn//sysId33.jpg)
